TextView.android:text:
Privacy Policy 
Effective Date: April 1, 2026 

At UCChat, your privacy is important to us. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and protect your personal information when you use our application and services. By using UCChat, you agree to the practices described in this policy. 
1. Information We Collect 
1.1 Information You Provide When you register and use UCChat, we may collect the following: 
• Account details: name, username, email address, phone number, profile photo 
• Messages and media: text messages, images, videos, audio files, and documents you send or receive 
• Account preferences and settings 
• Feedback, support requests, and communications with our team 
1.2 Information Collected Automatically When you use UCChat, we automatically collect: 
• Device information: device type, operating system, unique device identifiers 
• Usage data: features used, time and frequency of use, crash logs, and performance data 
• Log data: IP address, browser type, pages visited, and referring URLs 
• Location data: general location based on IP address (precise GPS location only if you grant permission) 
1.3 Information from Third Parties If you choose to connect UCChat with third-party accounts (e.g., Google, Facebook), we may receive limited profile information from those services as authorized by you. 
2. How We Use Your Information We use the information we collect to: 
• Create and manage your account 
• Provide, maintain, and improve UCChat features and services 
• Deliver messages and facilitate communication between users 
• Personalize your experience within the app 
• Send service-related notifications and updates 
• Respond to customer support inquiries 
• Detect, prevent, and address fraud, abuse, and security issues 
• Analyze usage trends to improve the platform 
• Comply with legal obligations 
3. How We Share Your Information 
3.1 With Other Users Your username, profile photo, and messages are visible to the users you communicate with. In group chats, your messages and profile are visible to all group members. 
3.2 With Service Providers We may share your information with trusted third-party vendors who assist us in operating the platform (e.g., cloud hosting, analytics, customer support). These providers are contractually required to protect your data and use it only for the purposes we specify. 
3.3 For Legal Reasons We may disclose your information if required by law, legal process, or governmental authority, or if we believe disclosure is necessary to protect the rights, property, or safety of UCChat, our users, or the public. 
3.4 Business Transfers In the event of a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets, your information may be transferred as part of the transaction. We will notify you via the app or email before your data is transferred and becomes subject to a different privacy policy. 
3.5 No Sale of Personal Data UCChat does not sell your personal information to third-party advertisers or data brokers. 
4. Data Retention We retain your personal information for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide the service. If you delete your account, we will delete or anonymize your personal data within 30 days, except where we are required by law to retain it for a longer period. Messages you send to other users may remain in their devices or our servers as part of their chat history even after your account is deleted. 
5. Data Security We take reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, or destruction. These include: 
• End-to-end encryption for private messages 
• Secure HTTPS connections for data in transit 
• Access controls and authentication requirements 
• Regular security audits and vulnerability assessments However, no method of transmission over the internet or electronic storage is 100% secure. We cannot guarantee absolute security. 
6. Your Rights and Choices Depending on your location, you may have the following rights regarding your personal information: 
• Access: Request a copy of the personal data we hold about you 
• Correction: Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data 
• Deletion: Request deletion of your personal data 
• Portability: Request a machine-readable copy of your data 
• Objection: Object to or restrict certain processing of your data 
• Withdraw consent: Withdraw consent where processing is based on consent To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at privacy@ucchat.app. We will respond to your request within 30 days. 
7. Children's Privacy UCChat is not intended for children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If we learn that we have collected such information, we will take steps to delete it promptly. If you believe a child under 13 has provided us with personal data, please contact us at privacy@ucchat.app. 
8. International Users UCChat is operated from the Philippines. If you access UCChat from outside the Philippines, please be aware that your information may be transferred to and processed in the Philippines or other countries where our service providers operate. By using UCChat, you consent to this transfer. 
9. Cookies and Tracking Technologies UCChat and its web version may use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your experience. You can control cookie settings through your browser preferences. Note that disabling cookies may affect certain features of the platform. 
10. Changes to This Privacy Policy We may update this Privacy Policy periodically to reflect changes in our practices or applicable laws. We will notify you of material changes via in-app notification or email at least 14 days before the change takes effect. We encourage you to review this policy regularly. 
11. Data Protection Officer If you have questions, concerns, or complaints about this Privacy Policy or our data handling practices, please contact our Data Protection Officer: 
UCChat Data Protection Officer 
Email: privacy@ucchat.app 
Address: UCChat Inc., Metro Manila, Philippines 
We are committed to working with you to resolve any concerns about your privacy. 

© 2026 UCChat. All rights reserved. www.ucchat.app · support@ucchat.appr
